name: Shea Butter (Unrefined)
description: An ivory-to-yellow fat from the African shea tree, rich in vitamins A, E, and F, with cinnamic acid esters providing anti-inflammatory and UV-absorptive properties.
chemicalName: Mixed triglycerides with cinnamic acid esters
appearance: Unrefined: ivory to yellowish solid with nutty aroma; Refined: white, odorless
solubility: Insoluble in water; soluble in oils, fats, and warm ethanol
chemistry: Vitamins A, E, F. Cinnamic acid esters (anti-inflammatory). Melts at body temp. Non-comedogenic.
